value.name: incipit
value.summary: Template-driven CLI for transforming structured resume data into polished PDFs, DOCX, HTML, LaTeX, and Markdown, featuring pluggable templates and multi-agent AI assessment. Built with Go and TeX for flexible document generation.

value.name: mnemonist
value.summary: Open ecosystem for tool-agnostic AI agent memory, implemented in Rust and Python. Enables seamless integration of memory modules across diverse agent frameworks.

value.name: saige
value.summary: Unified Go SDK and CLI for streaming AI agents, knowledge graphs, and retrieval-augmented generation pipelines. Bridges agent orchestration and graph-based knowledge management.

value.name: flappy-bird
value.summary: JavaFX Flappy Bird clone showcasing data-oriented design patterns and automated native builds for Linux, macOS, and Windows. Demonstrates cross-platform desktop development.

value.name: chess-cli
value.summary: Fully playable chess game with object-oriented design and command-line interface in Python. Ideal for learning game logic and exploring chess AI algorithms.

value.name: teasr
value.summary: Rust-powered tool for capturing showcase screenshots and GIFs from web apps, desktop, and terminal. Delivers a single binary with no runtime dependencies for streamlined media generation.

value.name: linear-gp
value.summary: Production-grade Rust framework for Linear Genetic Programming research, offering modular architecture, Q-Learning integration, and automated hyperparameter optimization. Supports reinforcement learning and classification tasks.

value.name: lepus-classifier
value.summary: CNN research project in Jupyter Notebook and Python, exploring optimal image classification architectures for small datasets. Highlights data quantity as the key bottleneck in deep learning performance.

value.name: dotfiles
value.summary: Cross-platform dotfiles managed by Chezmoi with Homebrew/apt and per-language version managers. Provides one-command bootstrap for macOS and Linux with Neovim, Tmux, Zsh, and AI agent skills.

value.name: md-classifier
value.summary: Deep learning system combining transformers and CNNs to classify diseases from patient-described symptoms. Achieves high recall using semantic embeddings and CNN feature extraction.

value.name: duraturo
value.summary: Go utility for durable execution of existing code, enabling ledgers, workers, and queues over user-owned storage. Wrap functions and run workers with minimal setup.

value.name: lazyspeak.nvim
value.summary: Voice-driven coding plugin for Neovim, allowing users to speak their intent and see edits appear in the editor. Built with Lua, Rust, and Vim Script.

value.name: generative-artifact-protocol
value.summary: Open standard for token-efficient artifact updates and streaming, featuring a Rust apply engine and evaluation CLI. Supports multi-language integration for generative workflows.

value.name: github-insights
value.summary: AI-powered GitHub profile metrics with SVG visualizations, project classification, and README generation. Available as a CLI, npm package, and GitHub Action.

value.name: gymnasia
value.summary: Pure Rust implementation of OpenAI Gymnasium environments. Facilitates reinforcement learning experiments in a Rust-native ecosystem.

value.name: urmzd.com
value.summary: Personal website, blog, and research portfolio built with Astro, React, and Three.js. Showcases interactive content and technical writing.

value.name: fsrc
value.summary: CLI, crate, and GitHub Action for embedding source files into any text file using comment markers. Built in Rust and Python for flexible code documentation.

value.name: dispatch
value.summary: Beta control plane for agent execution nodes, enabling deployment and scaling of sandboxed agents with shared workspace metrics. Built with Go and Shell.

value.name: agentspec
value.summary: Universal agent skill and sub-agent manager with terminal UI, implemented in Rust and Shell. Streamlines agent orchestration and skill management.

value.name: rlgp-thesis
value.summary: BCS thesis project on Reinforced Linear Genetic Programming, written in TeX and Shell. Documents academic research and algorithmic exploration.

value.name: glassbox-lm
value.summary: Testbed for observable language models where every hidden state is a readable distribution over words. Designed for interpretability by construction in Python.

value.name: lightning-kfold
value.summary: Stratified K-fold cross-validation with ensemble voting for PyTorch Lightning. Provides a drop-in solution for robust model evaluation.

value.name: zoro
value.summary: Privacy-first AI research agent with a persistent knowledge graph, running all inference locally. Connects ideas securely using Go and Python.

value.name: oag
value.summary: Fast OpenAPI 3.x code generator for TypeScript, React/SWR, and FastAPI, featuring zero runtime dependencies and first-class SSE streaming. Built with Rust and Jinja.

value.name: sr
value.summary: Release engineering CLI in Rust, offering automated semantic versioning from conventional commits. Delivers a single static binary with zero runtime dependencies.

value.name: languide
value.summary: Scenario-based language guides built from markdown, generating PDFs with full Unicode and CJK support. Focused on communication-driven learning.

value.name: urmzd
value.summary: GitHub profile README repository. Contains auto-generated profile content and project highlights.

value.name: streamsafe
value.summary: Type-safe async pipeline framework for data processing in Rust. Ensures robust and efficient data workflows.

value.name: zigbee-skill
value.summary: AI-native smart home skill enabling direct control of Zigbee devices without cloud or hub. Built with Go and Shell for seamless agent integration.

value.name: cypress-name-too-long-mre
value.summary: Minimal reproducible example for Cypress testing with JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Demonstrates edge case handling.

value.name: barter-trader
value.summary: Android trading app built with Clean Architecture and MVVM, enabling peer-to-peer item exchanges. Implements enterprise-grade mobile development patterns.

preamble.value: I design modular AI systems that bridge agent orchestration and memory, using Rust and Go for speed and reliability. Projects like saige and mnemonist show how I build unified SDKs and open ecosystems for streaming agents and tool-agnostic memory.
